title: ctenopteris humilis
intro: Ctenopteris humilis, also known as New Zealand fan fern or umbrella fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Ctenopteris humilis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and even aid in the treatment of certain skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Ctenopteris humilis is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
